name: Dyson PencilVac™
title: Dyson PencilVac™
description: The Dyson PencilVac™ is a concept ultra-lightweight, cordless vacuum cleaner designed for quick spot cleaning and precision tasks.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: The Dyson PencilVac™ is a concept ultra-lightweight, cordless vacuum cleaner designed for quick spot cleaning and precision tasks. This fictional product merges Dyson’s proven cyclone technology with a compact, pen-like form factor, perfect for desktop, car, and small-surface use.

specsAccordion.title: General
content: Color Options: Graphite, Silver, Limited Edition Purple

specsAccordion.title: Performance
content: Motor: Dyson HyperMini digital motor (custom, brushless)

specsAccordion.title: Power & Battery
content: Run Time: Up to 12 minutes (continuous use, standard mode)
Charging Time: ~45 minutes to full charge

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Dyson PencilVac™ is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer
title: Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer
description: The Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer is a concept high-performance hair dryer designed for rapid drying and intelligent heat control, inspired by Dyson’s engineering excellence.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: The Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer is a conceptual product that combines advanced airflow technology with ergonomic design. It delivers fast drying while protecting hair from extreme heat damage.

specsAccordion.title: General
content: Model Name: Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer
Form Factor: Sleek, balanced handle with circular nozzle
Color Options: Silver, Black, Limited Edition Rose

specsAccordion.title: Power & Battery
content: Run Time: Up to 25 minutes (standard mode)
Charging Time: ~90 minutes to full charge

specsAccordion.title: Features
content: Intelligent heat control to prevent extreme heat damage

specsAccordion.title: Package Contents
content: Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer main unit

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Supersonic r™ Hair Dryer is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Dyson 360 Vis Nav™ Robot Vacuum
title: Dyson 360 Vis Nav™ Robot Vacuum
description: The Dyson 360 Vis Nav™ is a conceptual robot vacuum featuring advanced navigation, powerful suction, and intelligent room mapping for a hands-free cleaning experience.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: The Dyson 360 Vis Nav™ Robot Vacuum is designed to autonomously clean your home with precision. Its advanced sensors and mapping technology ensure thorough coverage and efficient cleaning on all floor types.

specsAccordion.title: Power & Battery
content: Run Time: Up to 75 minutes (standard mode)
Charging Time: ~2.5 hours to full charge

specsAccordion.title: Features
content: Automatic return to dock and recharge

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Dyson 360 Vis Nav™ is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Dyson Purifier Big+Quiet Formaldehyde
title: Purifier Big+Quiet Formaldehyde
description: The Dyson Purifier Big+Quiet Formaldehyde is a conceptual air purifier designed for large spaces, featuring advanced filtration technology that captures ultrafine particles and destroys formaldehyde for cleaner, quieter air.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: The Dyson Purifier Big+Quiet Formaldehyde is engineered for powerful purification in large rooms. It uses advanced HEPA filtration and a catalytic filter to destroy formaldehyde, ensuring a healthier indoor environment.

specsAccordion.title: Performance
content: Filtration: HEPA H13, activated carbon, and selective catalytic oxidation (SCO) filter
Formaldehyde Destruction: Catalytic filter breaks down formaldehyde into water and CO₂

specsAccordion.title: Features
content: LCD display for real-time air quality monitoring

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Dyson Purifier Big+Quiet Formaldehyde is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Wearable Air Purifier
title: Wearable Air Purifier
description: The Wearable Air Purifier is a conceptual personal air filtration device designed to be worn around the neck or clipped to clothing. It provides clean, filtered air directly to the user, ideal for urban environments, travel, or allergy sufferers.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: This wearable air purifier uses advanced HEPA filtration and a compact fan system to deliver purified air to the user's breathing zone. Lightweight and rechargeable, it's designed for comfort and portability.

specsAccordion.title: General
content: Form Factor: Neckband or clip-on device

specsAccordion.title: Performance
content: Filtration: HEPA H13 and activated carbon

specsAccordion.title: Use Cases
content: Traveling on airplanes or public transport
Personal air purification in crowded spaces

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Wearable Air Purifier is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Dyson Zone™
title: Dyson Zone™
description: The Dyson Zone™ is a conceptual wearable air purifier and headphone hybrid, designed to deliver immersive audio and purified air simultaneously. It features advanced filtration technology, active noise cancellation, and a comfortable ergonomic fit for urban commuters and travelers.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: Dyson Zone™ combines high-fidelity headphones with a detachable air purification visor, offering both personal audio and clean air on the go. It is engineered for comfort, style, and performance in urban environments.

specsAccordion.title: General
content: Form Factor: Over-ear headphones with attachable visor

specsAccordion.title: Performance
content: Filtration: Dual-layer electrostatic and carbon filters

specsAccordion.title: Power & Battery
content: Run Time: Up to 4 hours (air purification + audio)

specsAccordion.title: Features
content: Touch controls for audio and airflow

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Dyson Zone™ is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Dyson MicroFan™
title: Dyson MicroFan™
description: The Dyson MicroFan™ is a conceptual ultra-compact, bladeless personal fan designed for on-the-go cooling with whisper-quiet operation and USB-C charging.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: Dyson MicroFan™ delivers a gentle, focused stream of cool air in a pocket-sized, bladeless design. Ideal for travel, office, or outdoor use, it combines Dyson’s airflow expertise with ultimate portability.

specsAccordion.title: Power & Battery
content: Run Time: Up to 6 hours (low speed)

specsAccordion.title: Features
content: Bladeless airflow for safety and easy cleaning

specsAccordion.title: Use Cases
content: Personal cooling at desk or outdoors

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Dyson MicroFan™ is a conceptual product; specifications are for illustrative purposes only.

name: Dyson Airstrait™ Straightener
title: Dyson Airstrait™ Straightener
description: The Dyson Airstrait™ is a wet-to-dry straightener that uses high-pressure airflow to straighten hair without hot plates, minimizing heat damage and preserving hair strength.

specsAccordion.title: Overview
specsAccordion.content: The Dyson Airstrait™ Straightener uses precisely angled airflow to dry and straighten hair simultaneously, with no hot plates and less heat damage.

specsAccordion.title: General
content: Color Options: Nickel/Copper, Prussian Blue/Rich Copper

specsAccordion.title: Disclaimers
content: Dyson Airstrait™ is an actual Dyson product. Specifications may vary by region.
